2603.24556.title: Evaluating Chunking Strategies For Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Oil and Gas Enterprise Documents
2603.24556.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a framework to address the constraints of Large Language Models (LLMs). Yet, its effectiveness fundamentally hinges on document chunking - an often-overlooked determinant of its quality. This paper presents an empirical study quantifying performance differences across four chunking strategies: fixed-size sliding window, recursive, breakpoint-based semantic, and structure-aware. We evaluated these methods using a proprietary corpus of oil and gas enterprise documents, including text-heavy manuals, table-heavy specifications, and piping and instrumentation diagrams (P and IDs). Our findings show that structure-aware chunking yields higher overall retrieval effectiveness, particularly in top-K metrics, and incurs significantly lower computational costs than semantic or baseline strategies. Crucially, all four methods demonstrated limited effectiveness on P and IDs, underscoring a core limitation of purely text-based RAG within visually and spatially encoded documents. We conclude that while explicit structure preservation is essential for specialised domains, future work must integrate multimodal models to overcome current limitations.
2603.24556.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）已成為一種框架，以應對大型語言模型（LLMs）的限制。 然而，其有效性基本上取決於文檔分塊——這是一個常常被忽視的質量決定因素。 本文呈現了一項實證研究，量化四種分塊策略之間的性能差異：固定大小滑動窗口、遞歸、基於斷點的語義和結構感知。 我們使用一個專有的油氣企業文檔語料庫來評估這些方法，包括以文本為主的手冊、以表格為主的規範以及管道和儀表圖（P and IDs）。 我們的研究結果顯示，結構感知分塊在整體檢索效果上產生了更高的效果，特別是在前K指標上，並且其計算成本顯著低於語義或基準策略。 重要的是，所有四種方法在P and IDs上表現出有限的有效性，突顯了純文本RAG在視覺和空間編碼文檔中的核心限制。 我們總結道，雖然明確的結構保留對於專業領域至關重要，但未來的工作必須整合多模態模型以克服當前的限制。
2603.24556.author: Samuel Taiwo et.al.
